0.text: Pleural effusion measuring 7.0 cm at its thickest point on the right

1.text: Atelectasis in the lower lobes of both lungs adjacent to the pleural effusion

2.text: Interlobular septal thickening in both lungs, more prominently in the upper lobes

3.text: Ground-glass opacities in both lungs, more prominently in the upper lobes
